context: Larry Rawlings Photography sole proprietorship - expense reimbursement and client passthrough rules.

validation_rules.rule: Travel beyond 30 miles is billed to the
validation_rules.requirement: Travel beyond 30 miles is billed to the client at IRS standard mileage.

validation_rules.rule: Purchases at or above $100 require Larry
validation_rules.requirement: Purchases at or above $100 require Larry's explicit approval before booking.

validation_rules.rule: Second-shooter and rental costs are pass
validation_rules.requirement: Second-shooter and rental costs are passed through with the client estimate.

validation_rules.rule: Receipts are logged within 7 days in the
validation_rules.requirement: Receipts are logged within 7 days in the expense ledger.
